activities.title: Read Transcript
activities.description: Read explicit Claude Code JSONL transcript lines for a project-scoped source session.

activities.title: Normalize Transcript
activities.description: Convert supported user and assistant blocks into OpenCode text messages plus bounded tool evidence.

activities.title: Write Messages
activities.description: Persist imported raw messages and parts through Session APIs.

activities.description: Derive deterministic takeover summary text and source line range metadata.

activities.title: Commit Anchor
activities.description: Write an assistant summary message into the same message stream for filterCompacted.
